description: A stress test for file-scoped import resolution involving multiple external and local packages all related to 'uuid'.

assertions.description: The 'RealGoogleUUID' field should point to the google/uuid package.
The 'LocalFakeUUID' field should point to our local uuid package.
The 'GofrsUUID' field should point to the gofrs/uuid package.
The 'ModerncUUID' field should point to the modernc uuid package.
The modernc field's TypeString should use its alias 'moderncuuid'.
